text_block_list.name: Aspiring Racer
text_block_list.text:
When I get to do a winning concert, I<n>want to tell all
my fans how much I<n>appreciate them!

text_block_list.name: Thankful Student
text_block_list.text:
I want to stand center stage and belt<n>out a huge
"thank you" from the<n>bottom of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Excited Contender
text_block_list.text: Yeah, me too! I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Runner
text_block_list.text: Sorry... I'm so sorry... I failed to win<n>again...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...They don't know when their<n>dreams will come
true, and yet the<n>racers dream on.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Even the brightest spotlight can't<n>illuminate every
corner of the stage.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: And so, it falls to me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Now that I can support! Concerts<n>provide
ample opportunities for<n>investigation!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I... don't know what to think.<n>Concerts in general
don't feel all that<n>necessary to me.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
I want to use this Grand Concert... to<n>connect our
hopes.
